description: Migrate to Virtual Machines is a Google Cloud service for discovering, replicating, and migrating virtual machines from environments such as VMware, AWS, and Azure into Google Cloud. Its API manages migration sources, groups, target projects, image imports, migrating VMs, and related operations.
summary: vmmigration.googleapis.com exposes one authenticated HTTP REST API: the Google Cloud VM Migration API at https://vmmigration.googleapis.com.
